location: Rare drop from Winged Misbegotten enemies. The most reliable farming spot is a cluster of three flying Misbegotten on the cliffs southeast of the Ailing Village Outskirts Site of Grace in Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: From Ailing Village Outskirts grace, head to the cliff edge southeast where three flying Misbegotten cluster together — much faster than hunting isolated ones elsewhere.
They dive-bomb and slash with a spinning double-weapon attack while airborne, which makes them awkward to punish; stay near the cliff edge since they tend to circle back into range.
Drop rate is only around 2%, so expect to reset the area (rest at a grace) and repeat several times.
Winged Misbegotten also appear later near Leyndell and in Miquella's Haligtree if you'd rather farm against tougher versions once you're stronger.
lore: Carried by the winged Misbegotten and matted with their own fur, this shortbow trades range for extra stopping power, hitting harder up close at the cost of reach.

builds.name: Pure Strength archer
builds.why: The only Light Bow with Strength as its primary scaling stat (D), making it the natural ranged pick for a Strength-focused character.

builds.name: Colossal weapon + bow hybrid
builds.why: Strength builds already carrying a greatsword or colossal weapon can slot this in as a ranged pull tool without spending points on Dexterity.
